The `serde` tag values match `bound.schema.json`'s"] # [doc = " `*Bound` discriminants (Rust drops the redundant `Bound` suffix on the variant names)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , PartialEq , Serialize , Deserialize)] # [serde (tag = "kind")] pub enum BoundKind { # [doc = " ε-magnitude bound (composes via ADR-010's affine-arithmetic kernel)."] # [serde (rename = "ErrorBound")] Error { # [doc = " Error magnitude (`>= 0`)."] eps : f64 , # [doc = " Norm in which `eps` is measured."] norm : NormKind , } , # [doc = " Failure-probability bound (composes via the union-bound kernel)."] # [serde (rename = "ProbabilityBound")] Probability { # [doc = " Failure probability in `[0, 1]`."] delta : f64 , } , # [doc = " Expected crosstalk with an optional tail."] # [serde (rename = "CrosstalkBound")] Crosstalk { # [doc = " Expected crosstalk (`>= 0`)."] expected : f64 , # [doc = " Optional tail bound (omitted from the wire form when absent)."] # [serde (default , skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] tail : Option < f64 > , } , # [doc = " VSA superposition capacity (`items` into `dim`)."] # [serde (rename = "CapacityBound")] Capacity { # [doc = " Number of superposed items (`>= 1`)."] items : u64 , # [doc = " Hypervector dimension (`>= 1`)."] dim : u64 , } , }

gaps.snippet: impl Bound { # [doc = " Well-formedness per `bound.schema.json`: the payload ranges (magnitudes finite and in range)"] # [doc = " **and** the basis constraints. Independent of the guarantee↔basis coupling, which"] # [doc = " [`crate::meta::Meta`] enforces; this is re-run on every deserialize, so the schema is a"] # [doc = " contract the wire form cannot evade."] # [must_use] pub fn well_formed (& self) -> bool { let payload_ok = match self . kind { BoundKind :: Error { eps , .. } => eps . is_finite () && eps >= 0.0 , BoundKind :: Probability { delta } => (0.0 ..= 1.0) . contains (& delta) , BoundKind :: Crosstalk { expected , tail } => { expected . is_finite () && expected >= 0.0 && tail . is_none_or (| t | t . is_finite () && t >= 0.0) } BoundKind :: Capacity { items , dim } => items >= 1 && dim >= 1 , } ; payload_ok && self . basis_well_formed () } # [doc = " Basis constraints from `bound.schema.json` (A6-02/B2-03): a cited theorem names its citation;"] # [doc = " an empirical fit rests on **at least one** trial with a named method — an `Empirical` tag must"] # [doc = " never be evidence-free (`trials: 0`); a user declaration carries nothing."] # [must_use] fn basis_well_formed (& self) -> bool { match & self . basis { BoundBasis :: ProvenThm { citation } => ! citation . trim () . is_empty () , BoundBasis :: EmpiricalFit { trials , method } => { * trials >= 1 && ! method . trim () . is_empty () } BoundBasis :: UserDeclared => true , } } }
